titles.en: Chapter on What is Permitted to Be Slaughtered in the Sanctuary and Taken Outside
Chapter on What is Permitted to Be Slaughtered in the Sanctuary and Taken Outside

segments: : «لاَ يُذْبَحُ فِي اَلْحَرَمِ إِلاَّ اَلْإِبِلُ وَ اَلْبَقَرُ وَ اَلْغَنَمُ وَ اَلدَّجَاجُ ».
arabic.text: : «لاَ يُذْبَحُ فِي اَلْحَرَمِ إِلاَّ اَلْإِبِلُ وَ اَلْبَقَرُ وَ اَلْغَنَمُ وَ اَلدَّجَاجُ ».

segments:
Hadith.2379 - Ibn Muskan narrated from Abu Basir, from Abu Abdullah (as), who said:
"It is not permissible to slaughter in the Haram except for camels, cows, sheep, and chickens."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.2379 - Ibn Muskan narrated from Abu Basir, from Abu Abdullah (as), who said:
"It is not permissible to slaughter in the Haram except for camels, cows, sheep, and chickens."

narratorChain.raw: 2379 - رَوَى اِبْنُ مُسْكَانَ عَنْ أَبِي بَصِيرٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ

titles.en: Chapter on What is Permitted to Be Slaughtered in the Sanctuary and Taken Outside

segments: «لَيْسَ مِنَ اَلصَّيْدِ إِنَّمَا اَلطَّيْرُ مَا طَارَ بَيْنَ اَلسَّمَاءِ وَ اَلْأَرْضِ وَ صَفَّ ».
arabic.text: «لَيْسَ مِنَ اَلصَّيْدِ إِنَّمَا اَلطَّيْرُ مَا طَارَ بَيْنَ اَلسَّمَاءِ وَ اَلْأَرْضِ وَ صَفَّ ».

segments:
Hadith.2380 - Mu'awiya ibn Ammar asked him about Ethiopian chickens.
Imam (as) replied: "It is not considered part of the game (ṣayd); game birds are those that fly between the sky and the earth and flap their wings."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.2380 - Mu'awiya ibn Ammar asked him about Ethiopian chickens.
Imam (as) replied: "It is not considered part of the game (ṣayd); game birds are those that fly between the sky and the earth and flap their wings."

narratorChain.raw: 2380 - وَ سَأَلَهُ مُعَاوِيَةُ بْنُ عَمَّارٍ : عَنْ دَجَاجِ اَلْحَبَشِ فَقَالَ

titles.en: Chapter on What is Permitted to Be Slaughtered in the Sanctuary and Taken Outside

segments:
جَمِيلُ بْنُ دَرَّاجٍ وَ مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ مُسْلِمٍ : سُئِلَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ عَنِ اَلدَّجَاجِ اَلسِّنْدِيِّ يُخْرَجُ بِهِ مِنَ اَلْحَرَمِ فَقَالَ «نَعَمْ لِأَنَّهَا لاَ تَسْتَقِلُّ بِالطَّيَرَانِ.
وَ فِي خَبَرٍ آخَرَ: «أَنَّهَا تَدُفُّ دَفِيفاً ».
arabic.text:
جَمِيلُ بْنُ دَرَّاجٍ وَ مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ مُسْلِمٍ : سُئِلَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ عَنِ اَلدَّجَاجِ اَلسِّنْدِيِّ يُخْرَجُ بِهِ مِنَ اَلْحَرَمِ فَقَالَ «نَعَمْ لِأَنَّهَا لاَ تَسْتَقِلُّ بِالطَّيَرَانِ.
وَ فِي خَبَرٍ آخَرَ: «أَنَّهَا تَدُفُّ دَفِيفاً ».

segments:
Hadith.2381 - Jamil ibn Darraj and Muhammad ibn Muslim reported that Abu Abdullah (as) was asked about Sindhi chickens being taken out of the Haram.
Imam (as) said: "Yes, because they cannot fly independently."
In another narration: "They only flutter lightly."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.2381 - Jamil ibn Darraj and Muhammad ibn Muslim reported that Abu Abdullah (as) was asked about Sindhi chickens being taken out of the Haram.
Imam (as) said: "Yes, because they cannot fly independently."
In another narration: "They only flutter lightly."

narratorChain.raw: ٢٣٨١ - وَقَالَ جَمِيلُ بْنُ دَرَّاجٍ وَمُحَمَّدُ بْنُ مُسْلِمٍ:

parts.text: َقَالَ جَمِيلُ بْنُ دَرَّاجٍ وَمُحَمَّدُ بْنُ مُسْلِمٍ:

titles.en: Chapter on What is Permitted to Be Slaughtered in the Sanctuary and Taken Outside

segments: «مَا لَمْ يَصُفَّ فَكُلْهُ وَ مَا كَانَ يَصُفُّ فَخَلِّ سَبِيلَهُ.
arabic.text: «مَا لَمْ يَصُفَّ فَكُلْهُ وَ مَا كَانَ يَصُفُّ فَخَلِّ سَبِيلَهُ.

segments:
Hadith.2382 - Al-Hasan ibn al-Sayqal asked Imam (as) about the chickens and birds of Mecca.
Imam (as) said: "What does not glide (in flight), you may eat it, and what glides, let it go."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.2382 - Al-Hasan ibn al-Sayqal asked Imam (as) about the chickens and birds of Mecca.
Imam (as) said: "What does not glide (in flight), you may eat it, and what glides, let it go."

narratorChain.raw: 2382 - وَ سَأَلَهُ اَلْحَسَنُ بْنُ اَلصَّيْقَلِ : عَنْ دَجَاجِ مَكَّةَ وَ طَيْرِهَا فَقَالَ

titles.en: Chapter on What is Permitted to Be Slaughtered in the Sanctuary and Taken Outside

segments: «هُوَ سَبُعٌ فَكُلُّ مَا أَدْخَلْتَ مِنَ اَلسَّبُعِ اَلْحَرَمَ أَسِيراً فَلَكَ أَنْ تُخْرِجَهُ.
arabic.text: «هُوَ سَبُعٌ فَكُلُّ مَا أَدْخَلْتَ مِنَ اَلسَّبُعِ اَلْحَرَمَ أَسِيراً فَلَكَ أَنْ تُخْرِجَهُ.

segments:
Hadith.2383 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) was asked about a man who brought his cheetah into the sacred sanctuary (Al-Haram). Is he allowed to take it out?
Imam (as) replied: "It is a predator. Whatever predator you bring into the sanctuary as a captive, you are allowed to take it out."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.2383 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) was asked about a man who brought his cheetah into the sacred sanctuary (Al-Haram). Is he allowed to take it out?
Imam (as) replied: "It is a predator. Whatever predator you bring into the sanctuary as a captive, you are allowed to take it out."

narratorChain.raw: 2383 - وَ سُئِلَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : عَنْ رَجُلٍ أَدْخَلَ فَهْدَهُ إِلَى اَلْحَرَمِ أَ لَهُ أَنْ يُخْرِجَهُ فَقَالَ

titles.en: Chapter on What is Permitted to Be Slaughtered in the Sanctuary and Taken Outside

segments: : «لاَ بَأْسَ بِقَتْلِ اَلنَّمْلِ وَ اَلْبَقِّ فِي اَلْحَرَمِ » وَ قَالَ «لاَ بَأْسَ بِقَتْلِ اَلْقَمْلَةِ فِي اَلْحَرَمِ وَ غَيْرِهِ».
arabic.text: : «لاَ بَأْسَ بِقَتْلِ اَلنَّمْلِ وَ اَلْبَقِّ فِي اَلْحَرَمِ » وَ قَالَ «لاَ بَأْسَ بِقَتْلِ اَلْقَمْلَةِ فِي اَلْحَرَمِ وَ غَيْرِهِ».

segments:
Hadith.2384 - Muawiya ibn Ammar narrated from Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) that he said: "There is no harm in killing ants and bedbugs in the sacred sanctuary (Al-Haram)."
Imam (as) also said: "There is no harm in killing lice both within the sanctuary and outside of it."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.2384 - Muawiya ibn Ammar narrated from Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) that he said: "There is no harm in killing ants and bedbugs in the sacred sanctuary (Al-Haram)."
Imam (as) also said: "There is no harm in killing lice both within the sanctuary and outside of it."

narratorChain.raw: 2384 - وَ رَوَى عَنْهُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ مُعَاوِيَةُ بْنُ عَمَّارٍ أَنَّهُ قَالَ

parts.text: 2384 - وَ رَوَى عَنْهُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ مُعَاوِيَةُ بْنُ عَمَّارٍ أَنَّهُ قَالَ

titles.en: Chapter on What is Permitted to Be Slaughtered in the Sanctuary and Taken Outside

segments: : «كُلُّ مَا لَمْ يَصُفَّ مِنَ اَلطَّيْرِ فَهُوَ بِمَنْزِلَةِ اَلدَّجَاجِ.
arabic.text: : «كُلُّ مَا لَمْ يَصُفَّ مِنَ اَلطَّيْرِ فَهُوَ بِمَنْزِلَةِ اَلدَّجَاجِ.

segments: Hadith.2385 - Abdullah ibn Sinan narrated from Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) that he said: "Any bird that does not glide in flight is regarded as being like domesticated chickens."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text: Hadith.2385 - Abdullah ibn Sinan narrated from Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) that he said: "Any bird that does not glide in flight is regarded as being like domesticated chickens."

narratorChain.raw: 2385 - وَ رَوَى عَبْدُ اَللَّهِ بْنُ سِنَانٍ عَنْهُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ أَنَّهُ قَالَ

parts.text: 2385 - وَ رَوَى عَبْدُ اَللَّهِ بْنُ سِنَانٍ عَنْهُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ أَنَّهُ قَالَ
